name: Jackson Financial Inc.
business: Jackson Financial Inc. offers a diverse suite of annuities to retail investors in the U.S., including variable, registered index-linked, fixed index, fixed, and payout annuities. It also provides institutional products and manages closed life and annuity blocks. The company distributes its products through broker-dealers, wirehouses, banks, registered investment advisors, and insurance agents.

exposures.sentence: We offer a diverse suite of annuities to retail investors in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: The RILA market has been the fastest growing category in the annuity market over the last five years, growing at a compound annual growth rate of 27% from 2021 through 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The RILA market has been the fastest growing category in the annuity market over the last five years, growing at a compound annual growth rate of 27% from 2021 through 2025.
